name: find_free_slots
description: Find all free time slots of at least the given duration between start and end, given a list of busy intervals. Returns a list of [start, end] pairs in HH:MM format.

busy.description: List of busy intervals, each [start, end] in HH:MM format.

day_start.description: Start of the day in HH:MM format.

day_end.description: End of the day in HH:MM format.

name: check_conflict
description: Check if any intervals in the list overlap. Returns true/false and the conflicting pairs if any.

intervals.description: List of intervals, each [start, end] in HH:MM format.
